question: Show the name and model year of the vehicle with most number of renting history records.
sql: SELECT v.name, v.Model_year FROM Vehicles v JOIN Renting_history rh ON v.id = rh.vehicles_id GROUP BY v.name, v.Model_year ORDER BY COUNT(rh.id) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找最常被租用的车辆名称和型号年份

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求显示最常被租用的车辆名称和型号年份，SQL反向翻译描述正确地使用了Vehicles表和Renting_history表，通过COUNT聚合函数统计租车记录数量，并按数量降序排序后取第一条记录。
